task: Find the tech specs of the MacBook Pro 16-inch introduced in November 2023.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully found Apple’s official technical specifications page for the correct model: “MacBook Pro (16-inch, Nov 2023) - Tech Specs - Apple Support” at https://support.apple.com/en-us/117737. The trajectory includes direct page evidence from both a browser snapshot and a webfetch showing the correct title, year introduced (2023), and detailed specs. The final response links to the correct page and summarizes key specs accurately from that page.
final_result_response:
Found it: https://support.apple.com/en-us/117737

Apple’s official page is **“MacBook Pro (16-inch, Nov 2023) - Tech Specs”**, year introduced 2023. <citation refs="fetch_call_KThdnxMwiR3awag825wm9buS|fc_01a7a0a9838660fa016a050ea08de08198bee1f8353db66776#1">“MacBook Pro (16-inch, Nov 2023) - Tech Specs” and “Year introduced: 2023”</citation>

Key specs:
- **Finish:** Space Black, Silver
- **Chip:** M3 Pro or M3 Max
- **Display:** 16.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR, 3456 x 2234, 254 ppi, ProMotion up to 120Hz
- **Memory:** 18GB or 36GB unified memory, configurable up to 128GB
- **Storage:** 512GB or 1TB SSD, configurable up to 8TB
- **Battery:** up to 22 hours Apple TV playback, up to 15 hours wireless web
- **Ports:** SDXC, HDMI, 3.5 mm headphone jack, MagSafe 3, three Thunderbolt 4 USB-C ports
- **Wireless:** Wi‑Fi 6E, Bluetooth 5.3
- **Size/weight:** 0.66 x 14.01 x 9.77 inches, 4.7 lb M3 Pro or 4.8 lb M3 Max
action_history: Opening Apple website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.apple.com/');
Searching Apple for MacBook Pro tech specs: await page.locator('e25').click();
Entering search query: await page.locator('e198').fill('MacBook Pro 16-inch November 2023 tech specs');
Opening Apple tech specs page: const p2 = await openTab('https://support.apple.com/en-us/117737');
